label: All Products
title: All Products
summary: An overview of IPM security products and integrated systems for organizations that need CCTV, video management, access control, alarm, fire protection, and network infrastructure.

items.name: IP Network Camera
items.description: Network-based surveillance cameras for enterprise sites.

items.name: DVMS Platform
items.description: Digital video management and recording platform.

items.name: Access Control
items.description: Door control and identity verification systems.

items.name: IPM AIOC Dashboard
items.description: Central command dashboard for incident visibility.

label: IP Cameras
title: IP Network Camera System
summary: IP surveillance cameras for enterprise monitoring, designed to connect with video recording systems and central control rooms.

items.name: Fixed IP Camera
items.description: Reliable monitoring for standard security areas.

items.name: PTZ Camera
items.description: Pan, tilt, and zoom camera for critical locations.

label: DVMS
title: Digital Video Management System
summary: Video management and recording systems for organizations that need centralized control across multiple camera locations.

items.name: IPM AIOC Dashboard
items.description: Combines camera views, incidents, and system status for the command center.

label: Specialized Cameras
title: Specialized Camera Solutions
summary: Advanced camera solutions for thermal detection, multi-sensor coverage, night vision, and analytics-ready security applications.

items.name: LPR & Speed Detection
items.description: Detects license plates and vehicle speed in controlled areas.

items.name: Radar & Drone Detection
items.description: Supports radar, drone detection, and perimeter threat monitoring concepts.

label: Infrared & Lights
title: Infrared & Illumination
summary: Infrared and lighting equipment that improves CCTV visibility in low-light and long-range environments.

label: Wireless Video
title: Wireless Video Transmission
summary: Wireless video transmission for locations where cabling is difficult or long-distance CCTV connectivity is required.

label: Access Control
title: Access Control System
summary: Enterprise access control systems supporting cards, FaceScan, biometrics, and time attendance workflows.

label: AI Alerts
title: AI Threat & Incident Monitoring
summary: Centralized threat detection and alerting for faces, weapons, flooding, license plates, vehicle speed, and other abnormal events.

items.name: Face & Identity Alert
items.description: Detects face and person-related security events.

items.name: Weapon & Threat Detection
items.description: Detects weapons, suspicious objects, and security threats.

items.name: Flood & Safety Alert
items.description: Alerts flooding, property-risk events, and abnormal environmental conditions.

items.name: LPR & Speed Event
items.description: Detects license plates and vehicle speed for traffic-related alerts.

items.name: AIOC Incident Console
items.description: Routes incidents into a war-room dashboard for response prioritization.

label: Fire Protection
title: Fire Protection System
summary: Fire detection and alarm systems for buildings and mission-critical areas.

label: Network & IT
title: Network & Computer Infrastructure
summary: Network infrastructure, hardware, and software foundations that support secure enterprise security systems.

items.name: Server & Storage
items.description: Supports video recording and data retention.
